title: White diagram background and remove labels from placed icons

requirements.text: Change the attack path diagram canvas background color to white.
acceptanceCriteria: The canvas/diagram area in AttackPathCanvas.tsx renders with a white (#ffffff) background.
The white background is visible in both normal and any overlay states.

requirements.text: Remove text labels from icons after they are dragged and placed onto the attack path diagram canvas. Icons on the canvas must display the icon image only, with no label text rendered beneath or beside them.

quotes: remove the label in icons after dragging the icon to the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: Icons placed on the diagram canvas (AttackPathCanvas.tsx) render without any text label.
The icon image is still rendered correctly at its correct position and size.
Icons in the toolbar (AttackPathToolbar.tsx) are not affected — they may still show labels if they currently do.
Existing diagrams loaded from the backend also display icons without labels.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change the backend schema or data model.
nonGoals: Changing icon behavior in the toolbar sidebar.
Modifying any other visual aspects of the diagram beyond background color and icon labels.
